announcements.headline: News Verification
announcements.body: The Exchange has sought clarification from Ola Electric Mobility Limited with respect to recent news item captioned Ola Electric Shares Slip 5% Amid Reports Of Two Suppliers Moving NCLT Over Dues..  The response from the Company is attached.
